description.value:
[2 actions] Archetype, Concentrate, Emotion, Fear, Mental

Only one in a million people are born with the innate capacity for Conqueror's Haki — the power to impose your will upon the world. You are one of them.

You release a burst of overwhelming spiritual pressure. All enemies within a 30-foot burst must attempt a Will saving throw against your class DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is Frightened 1.

Failure The creature is Stunned 1 and Frightened 2.

Critical Failure The creature is Stunned 2 and Frightened 3. It falls unconscious if it has fewer than half its maximum Hit Points remaining.

Creatures whose level is 4 or more below yours automatically suffer a critical failure result. Allies in the area are unaffected.

Frequency Once per encounter.
description.gm: Conqueror's Haki is intentionally gated as Rare. Only award this feat to characters for whom it is narratively appropriate — the power can't be trained into existence, only unlocked. In One Piece, characters like Shanks, Luffy, and Whitebeard have it; trained soldiers generally do not. The 'one in a million' framing gives you narrative cover to restrict it. The save DC uses class DC to scale appropriately with the character's primary build.

value.value: GM must determine the character possesses innate Conqueror's potential
